hero.title: Dalal jàmm ci sama Hub 👋🏻
hero.description: Man Wistant laa, moom mbirum xarala (Software Engineer). Damay defar ay xarala yu bees te dëgër ci Web, Mobile ak Desktop.

about.title: Ci man
about.content: Ci nootaay sama liggéey, dama doon def **full-stack development** laata may nekk **software architect**. Ci **2 at yi weesu**, dama sàkk **platform yu dëgër te yaa** (Web, Mobile ak Desktop), jàpp bu baax ci **Open Source**, te bokk ci **hackathons yu bari** ngir mbégte sàkk ci waxtu wu gatt. Tay jii, sama liggéey mooy sàkk **system yu dëgër** ngir lëkkale **architecture bu dëgër** ak user experience bu set.

seo.title: Ci man Wistant | Software Engineer ak Architecte Digital
seo.description: Xamle xalaatu Wistant ci wàll xarala. Ay liggéey yu dëgër ngir Web, Mobile ak Desktop.
seo.keywords: Software Engineer, Full-Stack Developer, Mobile, TypeScript, Next.js, Senegal, Cameroun

skills.title: Jumtukaay yi

seo.keywords: Portfolio, Projects, TypeScript, Next.js, Web Development, Mobile
